sourceList.title: Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - AGNES de Vermandois ([1085]-after 1127).
Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - AGNES de Vermandois, daughter of HUGUES de France Comte de Vermandois et de Valois [Capet] & his wife Adelais Ctss de Vermandois [Carolingian] ([1085]-after 1127).

zh.lifeSummary: 當Alix de Savoie於1064年出生在法國o-阿爾培斯薩伏伊時，她的父親Pierre I Comte de Savoie18歲，母親Agnès de Poitiers12歲。她於1080年與Humbert II de Beaujeu結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1094年9月6日在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯o波奧享年30歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素可。

zh-hans.Vasto, Chieti, Abruzzo, Italy: 意大利阿布盧左迪瓦斯托

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alix de Savoie于1064年出生在法国o-阿爾培斯薩伏伊时，她的父亲Pierre I Comte de Savoie18岁，母亲Agnès de Poitiers12岁。她于1080年与Humbert II de Beaujeu结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1094年9月6日在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯o波奧享年30岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素可。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Savoie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Pierre, Marcel, Damien, Jacques, Normand, Raoul, Alphonse, Antoine, Armand, Julien, Alcee.
French: habitational name from Savoy (French name Savoie), a region in the southeastern part of France, or from (La) Savoie, the name of several places in various parts of France. Compare Savoy .

History: Savoy was consolidated in the 11th century by count Humbert the White-Handed (Humbert aux blanches-mains). He was the founder of the great European noble house of Savoy, with large holdings of territory in France, Switzerland, and present-day Italy.

variants.name: Savoy
meanings: Altered form of French   Savoie  . It is also found in England, as an Anglicized surname of Huguenot origin.

variants.name: Savoia
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Aldo, Salvatore, Antonio, Dante, Enzo, Franco, Italo, Piero, Reno, Umberto, Vito.
Italian: habitational name from Savoy, in France, named Savoia in Italian. See Savoie .

nameMeanings.name: Alix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Alex  , used only as a feminine name. Its formation has probably been influenced by   Alice .

en.lifeSummary: When Alix de Savoie was born in 1064, in Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, France, her father, Pierre I Comte de Savoie, was 18 and her mother, Agnès de Poitiers, was 12. She married Humbert II de Beaujeu in 1080. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 6 September 1094, in Beaujeu, Rhône, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, at the age of 30, and was buried in Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alix de Savoie est née en 1064, à Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, France, son père, Pierre I Comte de Savoie, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Agnès de Poitiers, avait 12 ans. Elle a épousé Humbert II de Beaujeu en 1080. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 6 septembre 1094, à Beaujeu, Rhône, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, à l’âge de 30 ans, et a été enterrée à Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alix de Savoie 1064 in Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Pierre I Comte de Savoie 18 und ihre Mutter Agnès de Poitiers 12. Sie hat 1080 Humbert II de Beaujeu geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 6. September 1094 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Beaujeu, Rhône, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich und wurde in Sussex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alix de Savoie è nata il nel 1064 nel Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Francia, sua padre, Pierre I Comte de Savoie, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Agnès de Poitiers, aveva 12 anni. Lei sposato Humbert II de Beaujeu nel 1080. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 6 settembre 1094, nel Beaujeu, Rhône, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, all'età di 30 anni, e fu sepolta a Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Beaujeu, Rhône, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Fr: フランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスルhoンビーウジェウ
ja.Sussex, England: イギリスイギリススセックス
ja.Bâgé-le-Châtel,01026,Ain,Auvergne-Rhône-: フランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスエインブaグe-レ-チaテル
ja.lifeSummary: Alix de Savoieが1064年にフランスルhoネ-アルペスサボイで生まれた時，父Pierre I Comte de Savoieは18歳，母Agnès de Poitiersは12歳であった。1080年にHumbert II de Beaujeuと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1094年9月6日にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスルhoンビーウジェウで30歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススセックスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alix de Savoie(이)가 1064년 프랑스 ho니-알프스 서아보이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Pierre I Comte de Savoie(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnès de Poitiers(은)는 12세였다. 그녀는 1080년 Humbert II de Beaujeu(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1094년 9월 6일 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 ho니 보제이우에서 30세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수세스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alix de Savoie nasceu em 1064, em Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, França, seu pai, Pierre I Comte de Savoie, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Agnès de Poitiers, tinha 12 anos. Ela casou-se com Humbert II de Beaujeu em 1080. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 6 de setembro de 1094, em Beaujeu, Rhône, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, com 30 anos, e foi sepultada em Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alix de Savoie родилась в 1064 г. в местности савои, рoне-алпесь, Франция, её отцу по имени Pierre I Comte de Savoie было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnès de Poitiers, 12. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Humbert II de Beaujeu в 1080 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 6 сентября 1094 г. в местности боджеу, рoн, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция в возрасте 30 лет и была похоронена в местности суссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alix de Savoie nació en 1064, en Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Francia, su papá, Pierre I Comte de Savoie, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Agnès de Poitiers, tenía 12 años. Se casó con Humbert II de Beaujeu en 1080. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 6 de septiembre de 1094, en Beaujeu, Rhône, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, a la edad de 30 años, y fue sepultada en Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
